title: Spike trimer assembly as surface
prompt: Load the SARS-CoV-2 spike glycoprotein (6VXX), build the biological assembly (assembly 1), show it as a molecular surface, and hide the carbohydrates.
notes: Tests loading a specific biological assembly (assembly_id) plus a component toggle. 6VXX is a heavily glycosylated homotrimer, so hide_carbs is meaningful.
